word: G2020 - ἐπιφώσκω - epiphṓskō - ep-ee-foce'-ko - Begin to dawn

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐπιφώσκω

- Transliteration: Epiphosko

- Phonetic: ep-ee-foce'-ko

- Definition:

1. to grow light, to dawn

- Origin: a form of G2017

- TDNT entry: 14:10,1

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: A form of G2017; to begin to grow light: - begin to dawn X draw on.
